description: Routine imaging for seniors on Medicare Advantage
rationale: MRI is covered for members aged 65+ on Medicare Advantage plans.
Specialty drug requests require step-therapy documentation; missing docs need human review.

description: Cosmetic procedures are not medically necessary
rationale: Cosmetic procedures are excluded as not medically necessary.
Physical therapy is approved up to 20 visits per authorization.

description: High-cost service always needs human sign-off
rationale: High-cost services are flagged for mandatory human clinical review regardless of eligibility.
